name_cn:
Upgraded chip hardware~Apricot restock❤️Ohanel 19 Handbag
As Chanel's significant number, '19' continues the brand's classic naming convention, representing the year it was born, 2019, just like the 2.55 handbag launched by Mademoiselle Chanel in February 1955❗️
Flap bag Small size Apricot ZP leather Fully in stock!!
Light and soft sheepskin texture combined with the large diamond quilted design element
Three carrying ways: crossbody, shoulder, hand-held
Chain splicing: antique gold, antique silver, bright silver
Small size dimensions: 16x26x9cm (image)
